title: goodyera rostellata
intro: Goodyera rostellata, also known as the Rattlesnake Plant or Nerve Root, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Goodyera rostellata include relief from pain and swelling, as well as treatment for respiratory issues and fever. In herbal preparations, the roots of the plant are typically dried and made into a tea or tincture, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
